_comment: Reusable config for Sheko Collagene (collagen powder) on amazon.it, DataDive niche mJWqLITXJa (https://2.datadive.tools/niche/mJWqLITXJa). Core MKL at 30% + Expanded MKL at 1% for Never Ever. Style base = the product-neutral template built from the DE collagen v3 workbook. SEO-only run (PPC skipped). Collagen has NO authorized EU health claims (Reg. 1924/2006) — all joint/skin/hair/nail/anti-age effect terms are claim-risk and go to triage, not visible copy.

product_anchor.amazon_account_note: Assumed same seller as the IT fibre run — confirm before delivery.
product_anchor.asin_note: v2 anchor = B0H4M4DFFC (the Italian-language Sheko collagen listing, https://www.amazon.it/dp/B0H4M4DFFC/), supplied 2026-06-11. Same Sheko collagen family as B0F2HZVJMB / B0D1G28XR5 (canonical B0GGCBQLND). REQUIRES a fresh Core MKL export: B0H4M4DFFC is tracked in the LIVE DataDive niche (Ranking Juice refreshed 2026-06-11) but was NOT yet a column in the first Core MKL CSV export.
product_anchor.listing_status: Currently unavailable on amazon.it at 2026-06-11 capture

core_mkl.source: DataDive UI CSV (direct export), with the B0H4M4DFFC anchor rank column injected from DataDive MCP get_niche_keywords (2026-06-11), replacing the sibling B0F2HZVJMB column

expanded_mkl.source: DataDive UI CSV (recovered by scrolling the 1% grid after export downloads failed; all 500 visible keyword rows present, but NOT all off-screen ASIN-rank columns)

data_caveats._comment: Codex capture caveats 2026-06-11 — recorded for the manifest/handoff and for whoever reads the workbook.
data_caveats.expanded_mkl_1pct: Recovered by scrolling the 1% UI grid (export downloads failed). All 500 visible keyword rows captured; off-screen ASIN-rank columns are incomplete. Never-Ever (keyword+SV+relevancy) and the Expanded paste are unaffected; competitor-rank triage uses the Core 30% MKL, which has full rank columns.
data_caveats.roots_csv: Fallback-generated from the recovered expanded UI keyword set, not a direct DataDive roots export.
data_caveats.competitors_csv: MCP-derived from DataDive competitor data, not a UI CSV.
data_caveats.poe_returns: POE Returns route exposed no visible returns table; the JSON records the sparse visible route content (niche return rate 0.07%). 'POE Raw - Returns' will be an explicit not-exposed row.
data_caveats.product_family: Anchor B0F2HZVJMB and POE-top-clicked B0D1G28XR5 both resolve to the same Sheko collagen family; canonical variation B0GGCBQLND (SHEKO Premium Hydrolyzed Collagen 450g).

asin_roles.comment: v2 anchor = B0H4M4DFFC, with its own per-keyword ranks injected from DataDive MCP get_niche_keywords (research 2026-06-11). The sibling Sheko ASIN B0F2HZVJMB column was REPLACED (not kept as a competitor) so it can't corrupt the opportunity triage. All other ASIN columns are genuine competitors.

related_niche_filter._comment: SEED keep/exclude for the IT 'collagene' POE related-niches tab — REFINE from the actual POE related-niches grid once exported. Italian 'collagene' drifts into topical cosmetics (creme/sieri viso, filler, fili di collagene), lip products, and generic beauty.

triage._comment: SEED tokens — REFINE brand_tokens from the DataDive competitors CSV for mJWqLITXJa. Collagen has NO authorized EU health claim (Reg. 1924/2006; see eu-compliance-matrix.md) — joint/skin/hair/nail/anti-age EFFECT terms are claim-risk. Factual attributes (peptidi, idrolizzato, marino/bovino, tipo I/II/III, insapore, porzioni) are NOT claims and stay allowed.
triage._negative_tokens_note: marino/ialuronico/zinco are WRONG-TYPE/WRONG-INGREDIENT for Sheko: it is BOVINE peptide collagen (VERISOL/TENDOFORTE/FORTIGEL, type 1/2/3), PURE, with no added hyaluronic acid, vitamin C or zinc. High-volume terms like 'collagene marino' / 'collagene con acido ialuronico, vitamina c zinco' describe other products — do not target in Sheko copy (same accuracy discipline as the fibre/psyllium guardrail).

semantic_opportunity._comment: When no token rule fires, flag as opportunity if relevant AND Sheko under-ranks vs competitors. Otherwise Ignore.

never_ever._comment: Generated from the Expanded MKL 1% file. Only one-word rows classified Never Ever are written. relevant_words protect real collagen product intent; explicit_never_words force-negate topical-cosmetic/off-product junk.

tabs._comment: HYBRID layout: the 7 client-facing tabs match the updated Google template (Ecom Wizards/03_Templates/(Template) Brand-Country-Product Name Keyword Research) in name/columns/order; the builder's analysis tabs (Competitors, POE Raw, Semantic, Outlier) are appended after. Style base = template_keyword_workbook.xlsx (Google template's 7 tabs + analysis tabs).

generated_blank.5. Campaign Structure: PPC was not requested for this SEO workbook run.

inputs._comment: Input contract — paths the builder reads (CLI flags still override; ~ and repo-relative resolved). Browser/UI inputs are gathered by Codex via the connected browser; Claude writes seo_content + runs the build.
inputs.out: output/sheko/seo/Sheko IT Collagene Keyword Research 2026-06-11 v2.xlsx

stale_data_guard._comment: The product IS collagen, so collagen terms are allowed. Forbid (a) German-language collagen review/semantic topics that could leak from the DE collagen style base, and (b) IT-fibre terms that could leak from the prior fibre run. IT collagen POE tabs must be Italian + collagen-specific.
